caption: The video features Rishi Yadav, CEO of InfoObjects, speaking at an event called #theCUBE LIVE at #BigDataSV 2015, held at the Fairmont Hotel in San Jose, CA. He is seated in front of a backdrop displaying logos for BigDataSV 2015 and theCUBE. Dressed in a dark suit jacket over a light-colored shirt, Rishi appears to be engaged in a discussion or interview, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. The setting suggests a professional conference environment focused on big data and technology. A water bottle is visible on the table next to him, indicating a prepared and formal presentation setup.
